+randomguy6679 Excuse me? Let's just take a look at the comments for a minute here.
Andrew Bowers: "10/10 game of the year!"

author: @triblitribli7226

text:
+Crazycrab Obviously your just a SEGA fanboy if you can't see the purity of Nintendo gaming at it's finest, I feel a growing sorrow for you and doubt you have played the games firsthand and experience the vividly accurate controls, the diversity in combat features and items and most of all the selectable heroes to pick from.


It was a game ahead of it's time, truly revolutionary.
author: @triblitribli7226

text: +TribliTribli  You do realize that those "positive" comments are a sarcastic joke right?  Everybody knows that the Zelda CDI games were awful back then and they still are.
